text: Fresh fish marinated in lime juice, mixed with tomato, onion, cilantro, and avocado. Light, tangy, and refreshing — a beachside classic that captures the spirit of Manzanillo.
Shrimp sautéed in a fiery red chile sauce, served with rice and tortillas. Bold, spicy, and deeply satisfying — a favorite among locals and visitors alike.
Slow-cooked pork shoulder seasoned with guajillo chile, garlic, and bay leaf. Rich and aromatic, this traditional dish offers a taste of Colima’s inland flavors with a coastal twist.
